markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on client statuses and strategize on stalled accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**HX Client:** Stalled by slow reviews and missing image assets. Bailey will push \~40 article topics for approval today to build a content runway; Jakub will join Friday's call to escalate if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [**Relay Client:** Progress is slow without a key stakeholder. Bailey will send a Tuesday Slack reminder for CTAs and documentation to unblock strategic work.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**Logic Client:** Stable despite high CM turnover. The focus is on embedding interactive product elements, which Jakub will help measure for their impact on on-page metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)
  - [**New Role:** The "Account Strategist" role is being defined to centralize client comms and strategy, freeing up editorial leads for higher-value work.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)

## Topics

### HX Client: Stalled Progress

  - [**Problem:** Progress is stalled by slow client reviews and missing assets.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
  - [**Blockers:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [**Article Reviews:** Client reviews are slow, preventing content production.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [**Image Assets:** The client's designer has not provided sample images needed to build the image pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [**Immediate Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [**Bailey:** Push \~40 new article topics for approval in today's meeting to create a content runway.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [**Jakub:** Join Friday's call to escalate if no progress is made.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
  - [**Rationale:** Proactive escalation is needed to prevent the client from blaming the agency for slow results later.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### Relay Client: Slow Progress

  - [**Problem:** Progress is slow without a key stakeholder to drive decisions.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=433.0)
  - [**Blockers:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [**CTAs:** Awaiting client review.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
      - [**Documentation:** Needed from the client's accountants/bookkeepers team to begin keyword research.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [**Immediate Plan:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=248.0)
      - [**Bailey:** Send a Tuesday Slack reminder for CTAs and documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [**Jakub:** Join the weekly call only if the client responds with strategic questions.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)

### Logic Client: Stable but Inefficient

  - [**Status:** The client is happy, but production is inefficient due to high CM turnover.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [**CM Turnover:** The CM for Logic quit unexpectedly. Hassan will cover this week, but frequent changes require constant team calibration.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [**New Initiative: Interactive Product Elements**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
      - [**Goal:** Embed interactive product elements into content to boost conversion and on-page metrics (e.g., time on page).](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
      - [**Plan:** Bailey will follow up on the client's progress loading assets into their CMS.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
      - [**Measurement:** Jakub will help measure the impact of these elements vs. non-embedded content once traffic is sufficient.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

### Agentic Pipeline Updates

  - [**Auto Pipeline:** The new pipeline is non-functional.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [**Issues:** Incorrect target site → inaccurate information; missing fact-checking step.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
      - [**Action:** Bailey will use the old pipeline this week and fix the new one.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [**Relay Pipeline:** A new pipeline is ready for testing this week.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
  - [**Action:** Bailey will tag Jakub on Linear tickets for pipeline fixes and tests to share learnings.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)

### New Role: Account Strategist

  - [**Purpose:** Centralize client comms and strategy to free up editorial leads for higher-value work.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
  - [**Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
      - [Client-facing lead for relationships and strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
      - [Editorial oversight, but less line editing.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
      - [Keyword/cluster mapping and team organization.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=893.0)
      - [Proactive flagging of client risks (e.g., low client scores) to trigger interventions.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Bailey:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
      - [Push \~40 article topics for HX approval today.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
      - [Send a Tuesday Slack reminder to Relay for CTAs and documentation.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [Follow up with Logic on loading interactive product assets.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1354.0)
      - [Fix the Auto Agentic pipeline and test the Relay pipeline; tag Jakub on Linear tickets.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1111.0)
      - [Schedule a recurring monthly deep-dive reporting meeting for Relay with Jakub.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [**Jakub:**](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [Join the HX call on Friday to escalate if needed.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1297.0)
      - [Join the Relay call only if strategic questions arise.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1484.0)
      - [Help measure the impact of Logic's interactive elements once implemented.](https://fathom.video/share/ZzhM3LwFns1ATdGVpfWRjnXbDgxpBzVt?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)
